zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn於大約1160年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，他的父親Gwrgene ap Collwyn29歲，母親Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref28歲。他於大約1185年與Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1207年享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn于大约1160年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，他的父亲Gwrgene ap Collwyn29岁，母亲Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref28岁。他于大约1185年与Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1207年享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn was born about 1160, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gwrgene ap Collwyn, was 29 and his mother, Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref, was 28. He married Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed about 1185. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1207, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn est né environ 1160, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwrgene ap Collwyn, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed environ 1185. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1207, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn um 1160 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwrgene ap Collwyn 29 und seine Mutter Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref 28. Er hat um 1185 Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1207 im Alter von 48 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn è nato il circa 1160 nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gwrgene ap Collwyn, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed circa 1185. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1207, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllynが約1160年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで生まれた時，父Gwrgene ap Collwynは29歳，母Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdrefは28歳であった。約1185年にGwenllian ferch Ednyfedと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1207年に48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwrgene ap Collwyn(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1185년 Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1207년 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gwrgene ap Collwyn, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed aproximadamente 1185. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1207, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn родился около 1160 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gwrgene ap Collwyn было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed около 1185 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1207 г. в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn nació aproximadamente 1160, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwrgene ap Collwyn, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Generis verch Cynfyn Hirdref, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed aproximadamente 1185. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1207, a la edad de 48 años.
